generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.com/DTDFVocab
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived static friction parameters from gearbox data to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived kinetic friction parameters from gearbox data to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived viscous friction parameters from gearbox data to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization data for decision support in manufacturing"
]

instance SystemUnderstandingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic information for comprehensive system understanding"
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction to enhance motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time integrated visualization via a unified dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance SemanticSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Semantic support for comprehensive system understanding",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemUnderstandingInsight
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, SemanticSupportService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, SemanticSupportService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, SemanticSupportService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, SemanticSupportService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description language for component & connector modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description language for component & connector modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc architecture description language for component & connector modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML IBD for component & connector modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLStateMachine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavioral modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink simulation tool for analytical modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed behavior implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed behavior implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for the permanent magnet synchronous motor in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttSensorDataStream
]

instance GearTransmissionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for gear transmission parameters in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttSensorDataStream
]

instance CycloidalGearSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for cycloidal gear in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttSensorDataStream
]

instance MqttSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionSensor, GearTransmissionSensor, CycloidalGearSensor
]

instance RobotSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data from robot sensors streamed via MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, Cpp, Java, MontiArcAutomaton, SysMLStateMachine
]

instance SysMLRequirementsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for requirements abstraction in the Digital Twin",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBD
]

]

]

instance SysMLProductTechnicalLayerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBD
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACME
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADL

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStateMachine
]

    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is defined by a Digital Shadow Reference Model structured as a UML class diagram, specifying core concepts such as data traces, processing components, and metadata. Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) including SysML, AADL, MontiArc, and ACME are employed to model components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition. Concretization of the reference model involves creating conforming class diagrams that map reference concepts to concrete elements, enabling precise traceability of data processing steps through 'originates from' associations and transitive traceability for computed data traces."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle stages involve Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) during development, with modeling split into requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer abstractions. Methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are employed to manage complexity across these stages, integrating heterogeneous stakeholder perspectives through systems engineering modeling languages like SysML."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication protocol is MQTT for sensor data transmission; no details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols are provided in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems utilizes Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized interoperability and MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming, ensuring seamless data exchange between physical assets and digital components while adhering to industry-specific communication standards."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes SysML for systems engineering modeling, adhering to the SysML standard [17], and employs architecture description languages (ADLs) such as ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25, 26] for component & connector-based system descriptions. It integrates methodologies including RFLP [18, 19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] to manage system complexity across requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers, ensuring compliance with industry modeling standards and interoperability between heterogeneous tools and stakeholders."
]
